name: Hello Wasm
description: Reference WebAssembly plugin. Adds two integers via an exported wasm function. Demonstrates the wasm-kind plugin path with no WASI imports and no precompiled .wasm — the host compiles the bundled .wat at load time.
author: Swoosh

tools.name: wasm.add
tools.description: Add two integers via the bundled wasm module. Args: {a: int, b: int} → {sum: int}. Useful as a liveness check that the wasm runtime is wired up.
